creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #34)
> FWIW firefox doesn't build on armv6.

www/firefox hasn't appeared on pkg-fallout@ since 51.0 when it was blocked by a Clang crash. Now it's blocked by math/fftw3 and maybe more ports. I can't really begin on a fix without prebuilt packages as my build of devel/llvm40 is killed as runaway after ~20 hours spent on trying to link bin/clang-check.
